title: tylophora matsumurae
intro: Tylophora matsumurae is a perennial climber plant of the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in Asia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving asthma symptoms, as well as exhibiting antibacterial and antifungal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tylophora matsumurae is often prepared into a decoction or powder, and is also used as a tincture or in capsule form for its medicinal properties.
